title: A Straw Hat Refuses to Fall
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on a straw hat refuses to fall, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: A Straw Hat Refuses to Fall. Usopp and Chopper endure brutal attacks and keep fighting for Luffy, Vivi, and the crew’s promise. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: It's useless trying to dodge my fists!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: This fight's dragging on... I've gotta finish it quickly in one blow!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Can't believe... That my Mutton Shot... huff huff...

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: Failed to work on this okama... huff huff...

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: Can't believe... My Swan Arabesque... huff huff...

dialogue.speaker: Miss Merry Christmas
dialogue.text: Failed to work on this novice cook...

summary: This part develops a straw hat refuses to fall and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
